body.title: Update §3.4 with 6 undocumented memory types
body.result: added 6 missing types (EXPERIENTIAL, CREDENTIAL_REF, IDENTITY, CORE_PATTERN, ROLE_MODEL, ROOT) to §3.4 table in TheoryOfOperation.md; marked alignment-check GAP as RESOLVED
body.description:
TheoryOfOperation §3.4 lists 6 memory types but clan.memories has 12 (2026-05-30 alignment check).

Missing from doc:
- EXPERIENTIAL: 2560 nodes
- CREDENTIAL_REF: 167 nodes
- IDENTITY: 30 nodes
- CORE_PATTERN: 13 nodes
- ROLE_MODEL: 9 nodes
- ROOT: 5 nodes

**Affected files:** docs/TheoryOfOperation.md §3.4
**Scope:** IN — add the 6 missing types to the table with descriptions; OUT — do not change Igor's memory schema
**Completion criteria:** §3.4 table has all 12 types with a description row for each
